START: ^You land on a rocky island. A lighthouse stands at its highest point.
lighthouse_path: ^A winding path up to the lighthouse. Scrubby vegetation lines the way.
shoreline: ^A rocky shoreline. Tidal pools and sea caves.
lighthouse_base: ^The base of the lighthouse. A door and several outbuildings.
sea_cave_entrance: ^A cave accessible at low tide. Dark inside.
lighthouse_ground_floor: ^The ground floor of the lighthouse. Equipment and storage.
lighthouse_outbuildings: ^Several small outbuildings. One has a light in the window.
outbuilding_search: ^You find a torch in good condition.
far_shore: ^The far side of the island. Cliffs drop into churning water.
sea_cave_interior: ^The cave opens into a wide chamber. Ancient markings on the walls.
sea_cave_dark: ^Too dark to see. You turn back.
lighthouse_first_floor: ^The first floor. More equipment and a log book.
keepers_quarters: ^The lighthouse keeper's living space. Neat and organised.
dark_outbuilding: ^A workshop. Tools hang on every surface.
cliff_descent: ^You find a path down to a small beach.
cave_markings: ^Ancient navigation charts carved into the stone.
cave_deeper: ^The cave goes much deeper than expected.
log_book: ^Records of ships passing and weather observations.
lighthouse_second_floor: ^The second floor. The lens mechanism is visible above.
keeper_conversation: ^The keeper speaks of strange occurrences on the island.
keepers_search: ^You find personal items and a map of the island.
workshop_search: ^Tools and spare parts for the lighthouse mechanism.
hidden_beach: ^A beautiful hidden beach. Sheltered and calm.
cave_deep_chamber: ^A large underground chamber. A vault door is visible.
lighthouse_top: ^The top of the lighthouse. The beacon controls are here.
keeper_story: ^The keeper describes a vault beneath the island.
chamber_exploration: ^The chamber has old carvings and offerings.
lighthouse_view: ^An extraordinary view of the surrounding sea.
beacon_activated: ^The beacon blazes to life. A rescue ship responds in the distance.
beacon_manual: ^The manual controls are too complex without the signal stone.
island_rescue: ^The ship arrives. You are taken off the island safely.
north_cliff_path: ^A precarious path along the cliff face.
cliff_shelter: ^A natural shelter in the cliff face. Someone camped here once.
lighthouse_cellar: ^A cellar beneath the lighthouse. Damp and cold.
fuel_store: ^The fuel store for the lighthouse lamp.
island_interior: ^The interior of the island. Scrubby grassland.
standing_stone: ^An ancient standing stone. Carvings on its surface.
stone_study: ^The carvings match those in the sea cave.
interior_south: ^The southern interior. A small pond sits here.
boat_shed: ^A boat shed near the harbour. Empty now.
harbour_wall: ^The old harbour wall. Fishing boats once moored here.
harbour_walk: ^The harbour wall stretches out to sea.
harbour_view: ^A clear view of the shipping lanes.
east_cliffs: ^The eastern cliffs. More sheltered than the north.
east_cliff_end: ^The end of the eastern cliffs. A narrow ledge looks down to the sea.
island_summit: ^The highest point of the island. The lighthouse stands here.
observation_platform: ^An external observation platform on the lighthouse.
mirror_vault: ^A vault lined entirely with mirrors. Completely disorienting.
tide_trap: ^You are caught by a rising tide. The cave fills with water.
hidden_grotto: ^A beautiful hidden grotto on the island's western side.
collapsed_wing: ^A collapsed section of an old building near the lighthouse.
harbour_north: ^The northern end of the harbour. Fishing nets hang from poles.
exp_net_examination: ^The nets are old but well-maintained. No fish remain.
exp_waters_edge: ^The water laps at the rocky shore. Cold and clear.
exp_lh_base: ^The base of the lighthouse. Massive stone foundations.
exp_lh_east_side: ^The eastern face of the lighthouse. An old mooring ring in the stone.
exp_lh_door: ^The lighthouse door — heavy iron. A keypad beside it.
exp_keypad_attempt: ^The keypad requires a code. You do not have it.
exp_sea_wall: ^A long sea wall protecting the harbour.
exp_sea_wall_middle: ^The middle section of the sea wall. Spray hits you.
exp_sea_wall_end: ^The end of the sea wall. Open ocean stretches away.
exp_island_north: ^The northern interior of the island. Scrubland and rock.
exp_scrubland_search: ^You find some shelter among the rocks but nothing useful.
exp_interior_hill: ^A low hill at the island's centre.
exp_hill_top: ^The highest point on the island. Good visibility in all directions.
exp_hill_base_east: ^The eastern base of the hill. Sheep tracks in the ground.
exp_keeper_cottage: ^An old keeper's cottage near the lighthouse.
exp_cottage_search: ^Personal effects and old furniture. A photograph on the wall.
exp_keeper_photo: ^A keeper and their family. Happy faces from long ago.
exp_keeper_outbuilding: ^A small outbuilding. Tools and spare parts.
exp_south_coast: ^The southern coast. The sea here is rougher.
exp_tidal_pool_search: ^Sea anemones and small crabs. Nothing useful.
exp_coastal_shelter: ^A natural hollow in the rock face providing shelter.
exp_hollow_search: ^Someone camped here before. Ash and old tins.
exp_watch_room: ^The watch room where keepers once monitored ships.
exp_telescope_view: ^You can see the mainland faintly on the horizon.
exp_watch_logs: ^Logs of ships and weather going back decades.
exp_last_log_entries: ^The final entries grow brief and then stop suddenly.
exp_signal_room: ^A room for sending and receiving signals.
exp_signal_equipment: ^Old signal lamps and mirrors. Long unused.
exp_signal_room_view: ^A clear view of the approaches to the island.
exp_lamp_room: ^The lamp room at the top of the lighthouse.
exp_lens_examination: ^A massive Fresnel lens. Dusty but undamaged.
exp_lamp_room_view: ^The entire island spread out below. Remarkable.
exp_lh_cellar: ^A cellar beneath the lighthouse. Storage and supplies.
exp_cellar_search: ^Preserved food and fuel for the lamp. Old but intact.
exp_cellar_corner: ^A corner with locked boxes stacked to the ceiling.
exp_locked_box_attempt: ^The boxes are sealed with combination locks.
exp_east_cliffs: ^High cliffs on the eastern side of the island.
exp_cliff_edge_view: ^The sea crashes far below. Gulls nest in the rock face.
exp_north_cliffs: ^The northern cliffs. Less sheer than the east.
exp_cliff_descent_attempt: ^There are handholds but it looks dangerous without a rope.
exp_west_beach: ^A small pebbly beach on the western side.
exp_beach_search: ^Driftwood and old rope. Nothing of use.
exp_rock_pool_check: ^Clear rock pools full of sea life.
exp_generator_room: ^The generator room for the lighthouse electrics.
exp_boathouse: ^A boathouse at the harbour. No boats remain.
exp_boathouse_search: ^Life rings, old rope, and rusted tools.
exp_launch_ramp: ^A concrete ramp leading into the water. Empty.
exp_harbour_office: ^A small harbour office for managing vessel arrivals.
exp_harbour_office_desk: ^Arrival and departure logs. The last vessel was years ago.
exp_south_pier: ^A secondary pier on the south side of the harbour.
exp_south_pier_end: ^The end of the south pier. Mooring rings but no boats.
exp_chapel_interior: ^Simple benches and a plain altar. Peaceful.
exp_memorial_board: ^Names of sailors lost at sea. A long list.
dark_passage: ^A dark passage to the lighthouse exit. Your torch sputters and dies.
lantern_gate: ^A gate requiring a lit lantern to signal the keeper.
exp_weather_station: ^A small weather monitoring station on the island.
exp_instrument_reading: ^Wind speed, pressure, temperature. All normal for this coast.
exp_radio_room: ^A radio room for communication with the mainland.
exp_radio_log: ^The last transmissions recorded here are years old.
exp_foghorn_room: ^The foghorn room. A massive horn mounted through the wall.
exp_foghorn_examination: ^The mechanism is intact but needs power to function.
exp_store_annex: ^An annex off the main store room.
exp_maintenance_corridor: ^A maintenance corridor running around the lighthouse interior.
exp_maintenance_end: ^The corridor ends at a service hatch.
exp_service_hatch: ^A cramped space with pipe work and wiring.
exp_island_south: ^The southern interior. More sheltered than the north.
exp_south_meadow: ^A small sheltered meadow. Wildflowers grow here.
exp_meadow_edge_search: ^Wild herbs and insects. Peaceful but not useful.
exp_old_ruins: ^The ruins of an older building, pre-dating the lighthouse.
exp_ruin_search: ^Pottery shards and old coins. Archaeological interest only.
exp_asst_keeper_wardrobe: ^A wardrobe with spare uniforms and a locked box on the shelf.
exp_locked_personal_box: ^The box is locked with a small padlock. Personal.
exp_kitchen_search: ^Old tins and preserved goods. Some still usable.
exp_lh_pantry: ^A cool pantry. Shelves of jars, mostly empty.
exp_sitting_room: ^A sitting room for the keepers' leisure time.
exp_sitting_room_books: ^A small library of novels and reference books.
exp_equipment_store_back: ^A partition at the back with locked cabinets.
exp_equipment_cabinet: ^Locked. Requires a key you don't have.
exp_north_path: ^A path leading around the northern coast.
exp_crosspath: ^A junction of paths at the island's centre.
exp_fuel_depot: ^A fuel depot for the lighthouse generator.
exp_fuel_supply_log: ^Records of fuel deliveries. The last one was years ago.
exp_signal_tower_old: ^The ruins of an older signal tower, pre-lighthouse.
exp_signal_tower_climb: ^The remaining walls are too unstable to climb.
exp_north_pier: ^The main pier extending into the northern harbour.
exp_north_pier_end: ^The end of the pier. Deep water below.
exp_mooring_posts: ^Heavy iron mooring posts. Rope still tied to some.
exp_island_east_path: ^A path along the eastern edge of the island.
